Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enforcer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — An Enforcer is a soul type characterized by the shield symbol and uses strength to protect the clan from enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — An Enforcer is a Copper stage sacred artist born to focus madra into physical strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — Enforcers are a type of practitioner or rank mentioned in relation to combat effectiveness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Enforcers use their madra to make themselves stronger and their techniques involve strengthening the body.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Enforcer is a role or method of drawing power.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The red man was using an Enforcer technique.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Enforcer is a type of technique used by Jai Long.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Enforcer is a technique used to shorten distance.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon gripped an Enforcer by the neck.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Titan uses an Enforcer technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
